sources.name: Layoffs.fyi
sources.description: The de-facto standard tech layoff tracker, maintained by Roger Lee since 2020. Aggregates verified media reports and public filings. Free to use with attribution.

sources.name: TrueUp
sources.description: Tech-careers platform with a live layoff tracker that counts both layoff events and people impacted, updated continuously.

sources.name: Crunchbase News
sources.description: Editorial tech-layoffs tracker focused on US-based companies, updated weekly with company-level detail.

sources.name: WARN Notices
sources.description: Official US state filings required under the Worker Adjustment and Retraining Notification (WARN) Act for mass layoffs and plant closings. Authoritative, public, and the basis for the automated refresh pipeline.

sources.name: Computerworld
sources.description: Maintains a running 2026 tech-layoff timeline citing Layoffs.fyi, RationalFX, and company filings.

sources.name: TechCrunch
sources.description: Publishes comprehensive annual archives of tech layoffs with per-company headcounts and dates.

sources.name: Tech.co
sources.description: Running tracker of tech-company layoffs spanning 2022 to present, compiled from company announcements and media reports.
